name: loopy
description: Universal loop-engineering harness: machine-verifiable stop conditions, cross-model maker/checker (Codex maker, Claude checker), disk-based loop memory, reversibility×impact decision gates that keep human approval to irreversible actions while auto-pushing reversible work-branch commits, autonomous replan on stalls, a green gate (process audit + code review) before human merge, and a control-plane harness review (loop-review) that scores any project's ETCLOVG coverage and maturity with an adversarial red-team pass.
